net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface TravelClass

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    TravelClassImpl

    public interface TravelClass
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Travel Class'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Rows
    • Sequence
    • Passengers
    • Available Seats
    • Seat Pitch
    • XDimension Of Seats
    • YDimension Of Seats
    • Name
    • Row Structure
    • Load Factor
    • Travel Option
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getTravelClass()

    • Method Detail

      • getRows

        org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<Row> getRows()
        Returns the value of the 'Rows' containment reference list. The list contents are of type Row.

        If the meaning of the 'Rows' containment reference list isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Rows' containment reference list.
        See Also:
        CabinPackage.getTravelClass_Rows()

      • getSequence

        int getSequence()
        Returns the value of the 'Sequence' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Sequence' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Sequence' attribute.
        See Also:
        setSequence(int), CabinPackage.getTravelClass_Sequence()

      • setSequence

        void setSequence(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Sequence' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Sequence' attribute.
        See Also:
        getSequence()

      • getPassengers

        int getPassengers()
        Returns the value of the 'Passengers' attribute. The default value is "0".

        If the meaning of the 'Passengers' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Passengers' attribute.
        See Also:
        setPassengers(int), CabinPackage.getTravelClass_Passengers()

        void setPassengers(int value)
        Sets the value of the 'Passengers' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Passengers' attribute.
        See Also:
        getPassengers()

        int getAvailableSeats()
        Returns the value of the 'Available Seats' attribute. The default value is "0".

      • getName

        java.lang.String getName()
        Returns the value of the 'Name' attribute. The default value is "Placeholder String".

        If the meaning of the 'Name' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Name' attribute.
        See Also:
        setName(String), CabinPackage.getTravelClass_Name()

        Sets the value of the 'Name' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Name' attribute.
        See Also:
        getName()

      • getRowStructure

        java.lang.String getRowStructure()
        Returns the value of the 'Row Structure' attribute. The default value is "3-3".

        If the meaning of the 'Row Structure' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Row Structure' attribute.
        See Also:
        setRowStructure(String), CabinPackage.getTravelClass_RowStructure()

        value - the new value of the 'Load Factor' attribute.
        See Also:

      • getTravelOption

        TravelOption getTravelOption()
        Returns the value of the 'Travel Option' attribute. The default value is "EconomyClass". The literals are from the enumeration TravelOption.

        If the meaning of the 'Travel Option' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Travel Option' attribute.
        See Also:
        TravelOption, setTravelOption(TravelOption), CabinPackage.getTravelClass_TravelOption()

      • setTravelOption

        void setTravelOption(TravelOption value)
        Sets the value of the 'Travel Option' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Travel Option' attribute.
        See Also:
        TravelOption, getTravelOption()
